highlights: Designed and shipped the H2OPure storefront experience on Shopify for direct-response conversion.
Integrated Shopify order flow with TrackDesk attribution and commission logic.
Implemented webhook-driven sync patterns to connect paid orders to affiliate tracking in near real time.
impact: Connected storefront conversion with affiliate operations, improving attribution clarity and reducing manual commission handling.
one_liner: E-commerce build and integration stack for h2opure.io with Shopify storefront + TrackDesk affiliate automation.
problem: Growth required a high-converting storefront plus reliable affiliate attribution between Shopify purchases and TrackDesk partners.
solution: Built the web experience and backend integration layer to unify Shopify commerce events with TrackDesk affiliate workflows.
title: H2OPure Commerce + Affiliate Integration
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
